image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if you could remember more just by creating it yourself?
Context visual: This is the generation effect, a powerful concept in psychology.
Escalation visual: When you generate info—like writing or drawing—your brain retains it better.
Evidence visual: Studies show this effect is stronger than just reading or passively learning.
Payoff visual: So next time you need to remember something, try creating it yourself!
Cta visual: Curious about more mind hacks? Like and follow for more!
